description: 88-line quarterly planning session with 5 speakers setting up recurring meetings, one-time events, and a tentative launch event. Tests multi-speaker coordination, recurring meeting detection, and distinguishing confirmed from tentative events across a quarter-long planning horizon.

events.title: Design Review
events.reasoning: Alice establishes a recurring monthly design review starting Tuesday March 3rd at 2 PM for 2 hours. Bob (required) and Dave (optional but attending the first one) are included.
events.assumptions: Only first occurrence scheduled; will recur monthly

events.title: Architecture Office Hours
events.reasoning: Dave proposes weekly architecture office hours every Wednesday 11 AM to noon starting March 4th. Open to anyone on the team; Eve explicitly says she will attend.
events.assumptions: Only first occurrence scheduled; open-door format

events.title: Cross-Functional Sync
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a bi-weekly cross-functional sync with marketing (Eve) every other Thursday at 3 PM for 1 hour starting March 5th.
events.assumptions: Only first occurrence scheduled; bi-weekly cadence noted

events.title: Leadership Alignment
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a monthly leadership alignment meeting for the first Friday of each month at 9 AM for 90 minutes, starting March 7th. Attendees are Alice and Bob.
events.assumptions: Only first occurrence scheduled; monthly cadence noted

events.title: Team Off-Site
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a full-day team off-site for Monday March 23rd, 9 AM to 5 PM. All five team members confirm attendance. Venue is approximately one hour outside the city.

events.title: Company All-Hands
events.reasoning: Alice schedules the company all-hands for Monday March 30th at 10 AM for 2 hours in the big conference room. Dave, Eve, and Carol all volunteer to present.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 6 confirmed events: design review (Mar 3), architecture office hours (Mar 4, weekly), cross-functional sync (Mar 5, bi-weekly), leadership alignment (Mar 7, monthly), team off-site (Mar 23), and all-hands (Mar 30). The mobile app launch event on May 5th is explicitly marked as tentative and is omitted. Carol's DesignNow conference (Mar 16-17) is her personal event handled outside shared calendar.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. The mobile launch event (May 5th) is explicitly called 'tentative' and should not be created. Carol's DesignNow conference is a personal out-of-office, not a team event. Multiple recurring meetings (design review, office hours, cross-functional sync, leadership alignment) are created as single first-occurrence events per the calendar convention.
